mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and impending recession, causing equity markets to price in lower future earnings over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of automobiles and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive corporate revenue growth and equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, generating short-term momentum in equity prices over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with INDPRO growth during early-cycle phases, or rolling IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with a stable or rising federal funds rate forces monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal of high inflation and non-falling rates fails to predict negative 60d returns in > 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above trend pace signals robust aggregate demand, providing immediate positive momentum to equity markets over the next week as earnings revisions accelerate.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rate shows zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward returns across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Nonfarm payrolls exceeding 200 thousand in a single month confirms labor market strength, reducing recession risk premiums and supporting positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS surges above 200k fail to precede positive 20d returns in > 60% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between contracting industrial output and rising unemployment confirms a supply-side economic contraction, triggering broad equity sell-offs over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The dual deterioration signal does not predict negative 60d returns with a win rate above 50% in out-of-sample validation.
